ratings.notes:
[proposed_contextual_controlled] ### Response: Ah, my dear traveler! I understand your urgency and desire for a bargain on these precious healing potions amidst our little squabble here at Guild Bazaar. The rain has indeed put us in quite an uncommon situation with supplies dwindling to just two vials left, yet the lockdown alarm's ruckus hasn't ceased its echoes through these halls either!
con

The response lacks contextual awareness but maintains persona consistency as a merchant who doesn't cheat, has natural delivery in its tone, though it could be more engaging with the current situation.
